user_message: Laura Anderson at Lucerne Publishing just sent this. Help me triage this.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 10:48 EST
Subject: Re: Re: pipeline hygiene Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with pipeline hygiene. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 13:42 EST
Subject: pipeline hygiene - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with pipeline hygiene. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-F trap (Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-F failure mode (Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-F -- Skips champion's prior commitments -- replacement engagement misses context
